general: It is written: The just shall live by faith.
The Lord is my strength and shield.
I can do all things through Christ.
Thanks be to God, who gives victory.
The word of God is quick and powerful.
Greater is he that is in me.
I will trust, and not be afraid.
The Lord shall fight for me today.
My help cometh from the Lord alone.
In God have I put my trust.
I will not move from gospel hope.
The sword of the Spirit is God's word.
Apathy: Whatsoever thy hand finds, do with might.
Fervent in spirit, I serve the Lord.
Bitterness: For Christ's sake, God hath forgiven me.
I put away bitterness, wrath, and anger.
Deceit: I cast down lies with God's truth.
The lip of truth shall be established.
Despair: Hope thou in God, O my soul.
Christ in me is the hope of glory.
Doubt: Lord, I believe; help thou mine unbelief.
I walk by faith, not by sight.
Envy: Godliness with contentment is great gain indeed.
The Lord is my chosen portion forever.
Fear: God hath not given me fear today.
The Lord is my light and salvation.
Gluttony: Man shall not live by bread alone.
I bring my body into full subjection.
Enmity: Blessed are the peacemakers, saith the Lord.
I will overcome evil with good today.
Hypocrisy: Create in me a clean heart, O God.
Let love be without dissimulation before God.
Idolatry: Him only shalt thou serve and worship.
Little children, keep yourselves from all idols.
Legalism: By grace are ye saved through faith.
Christ hath made me truly free indeed.
Lust: Blessed are the pure in heart always.
I flee lust, and follow after righteousness.
Malice: Be ye kind one to another today.
I will not be overcome of evil.
Pride: God gives grace unto the humble soul.
He must increase, but I must decrease.
Rebellion: To obey is better than sacrifice today.
I delight to do thy will, Lord.
Sloth: Awake, and arise from the dead now.
I press toward the mark for Christ.
Vanity: The world passeth away with its lust.
My glory is in Christ's cross alone.
Greed: I lay up treasure in heaven above.
My God shall supply all my need.
Wrath: Wrath worketh not God's true righteousness.
A soft answer turneth away hot wrath.
Mammon: Ye cannot serve both God and mammon.
My treasure is safely laid in heaven.
Beelzebub: The prince of this world is judged.
No corruption shall withstand God's holy kingdom.
Belial: What concord hath Christ with Belial now?
I am under the law to Christ.
Legion: Greater is he that is in me.
God shall bruise Satan under our feet.
Apollyon: Christ destroys the works of the devil.
Death is swallowed up in victory forever.
Lucifer: Get thee behind me now, Satan.
I submit to God and resist you.
Dragon: We overcome by the blood of the Lamb.
The Lord shall consume thee by his word.
